description_long: This object is a roughly rectangular slab of stone featuring a high-relief carving of a robed human figure on its front face. The figure appears to be standing, with one arm bent and the other possibly holding an object or resting against a background element. The stone's surface is uneven and textured, with visible chisel marks and irregular edges, suggesting it may be a fragment of a larger sculptural work or architectural element. The back of the stone is mostly flat but lacks any significant detail, while the sides are jagged and thin, indicating breakage or weathering. The coloration is a pale, off-white, typical of limestone or marble, and the overall form is quite thin relative to its height and width. This type of carved stone could be found as part of a historical monument, wall relief, or decorative barrier in an urban park or near a public building.
description: A pale, rectangular stone slab with a high-relief carving of a robed human figure on its front, featuring rough, jagged edges and a textured surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the detailed relief of a robed human figure, with visible folds in the garment and a textured, uneven background.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the stone's thin profile and jagged, irregular edge, with little visible detail except the depth of the carving.
description_view_2: The back view is mostly flat and featureless, showing only the rough stone surface without any carved details.
description_view_3: The right side view, like the left, highlights the thinness and irregularity of the slab, with the relief's depth faintly visible.
attribute_location: historic urban park or public square
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or incorporated into a decorative wall
attribute_pattern: High-relief human figure carving with irregular chisel marks and no repeating geometric pattern
attribute_weathering: Rough and slightly eroded, with visible tool marks and some edge chipping indicating moderate weathering
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with modern urban elements but may be partially surrounded by landscaping or set into masonry for display
